query:
SELECT
                id::text       AS "id!",
                email          AS "email!",
                COALESCE(display_name, '') AS "display_name!"
            FROM tenants
            WHERE tier                = 'Free'
              AND trial_ends_at       IS NOT NULL
              AND trial_ends_at       < now()
              AND promo_email_sent_at IS NULL
              AND email               IS NOT NULL
              AND email               <> ''
